content.description:
Third-party extensions without modifying the kernel.

## Concept

- Install plugins from external sources
- Plugins add new types, views, field editors, libraries
- Sandboxed execution with permission model
- Plugin registry and update mechanism

## Current Status: Deferred by Design

The item system already enables "plugins" — just create items with new types, views, and libraries. No special plugin infrastructure is needed for personal use. The [Import/Export System](item://c0c0c0c0-0027-0000-0000-000000000000) handles installation (import a JSON file).

## When This Becomes Relevant

- If Hobson becomes multi-user
- If untrusted code needs sandboxing
- If a plugin registry/marketplace is desired

## Security Challenges

- How to sandbox untrusted code? (Currently all code runs with full access)
- What API surface to expose to plugins?
- How to prevent malicious plugins?

## Priority

Low — the existing item system IS the plugin system for personal use.
